sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17630" key="au)tobradu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-βρᾰδύτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ideal slowness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
